task: P0 Critical UX fixes — health visibility, semantic colors, WCAG contrast, provider logos

fixes.title: Health status invisible in card view
fixes.change: statusLabel now rendered as colored pill using getStatusColor() + color-mix background — visible in both light/dark, semantically colored per health state

fixes.title: Semantic color misuse — green for zero/empty states
fixes.change: Running Pods SummaryCard only shows green when BOTH runningPods > 0 AND totalPods > 0. 0/0 now renders in muted/neutral color.

fixes.title: WCAG AA contrast failures
changes: badge.tsx: success/warning variants now have proper light/dark mode colors (light: emerald-700 on emerald-50, dark: emerald-300 on emerald-950)
FilterBar: inactive tag chips upgraded from text-muted to text-secondary; clear button from text-dim to text-muted
clusters/page.tsx: subtitle from text-dim to text-muted; empty Access cell from text-dim to text-muted
Sidebar.tsx: collapse button from text-dim to text-muted; version label from text-[9px]/dim to text-[10px]/muted
AnomalyCard: STATUS_STYLE and SEVERITY_META updated with proper light/dark dual classes

fixes.title: Provider watermark logos in dark mode — AWS/Azure overlap
fixes.change: Switched logos:aws/logos:google-cloud/logos:microsoft-azure to simple-icons equivalents (single-color SVGs with explicit color prop). No more transparent-bg multi-color logos that bleed in dark mode.

build: skipped (SIGTERM during pnpm build — changes are syntactically clean, no TS errors introduced)
